title: Small Utills
description: A small and clean utility pack that improves gameplay without covering or cluttering your screen.
body:
Small Utils is a lightweight utility resource pack designed to improve clarity while keeping your screen clean and distraction-free.
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c20dd5b18e3d38f5673dac6632faced5c2949769.png)
It enhances important PvP and survival items like the Totem of Undying, Golden Apple, and Water Bucket, making them easier to see and use in fast situations — without adding heavy visuals or unnecessary effects.

This pack focuses on small, smart tweaks that improve gameplay while preserving the vanilla feel.


⚡ Features

- Clearer Totem visibility

- Enhanced Golden Apple clarity

- small Water Bucket

- Minimal design

- No screen clutter

- all items small
Lightweight & performance friendly

🎮 Perfect For

- PvP players

- Clutch situations

- Survival gameplay

- Players who prefer clean and small items
